translations.01KQXQV12GT0HJCTZ3772CA2GF: Warp 初始化脚本的输出显示在上方，以协助调试。
translations.01KQXQV10GESG857ZEW9TNN0VY:
欢迎使用 Warp on Web —— 您在浏览器中的 Warp 之家！
使用 Warp on Web 可以：
* 加入共享会话
* 创建、查看和编辑 Warp Drive 对象
* 管理您的 Warp 设置

您那些尚未下载 Warp 的队友和同事也可以使用 Warp on Web 来查看您共享的会话、笔记本和工作流。
translations.01KQXQV12BW8P1RCY3NZGPK58J: 解析 YAML 前置元数据失败

notes: model_selector.rs:548 — MenuItemFields::new("default") is the visible label for the default model menu item -> translate to 默认 (the query-match literal on line 546 is a separate untouched literal). shell_process_terminated.rs:25 — Text::new(...) inside InlineBannerContent, user-facing banner body -> translate, brand Warp preserved. theme.rs:137 — ReceivedReferralReward ThemeKind Display name used by .matches() query and theme picker; theme identifier -> protocol_key. links.rs:11 — .expect("Should not fail to parse") -> panic_message. home.rs:12 — WARP_HOME_CONTENT raw string rendered in home pane via open_static -> translate, preserved leading newline + bullet/newline shape, brand Warp/Warp Drive/Warp on Web preserved. parser.rs:57 — .context("Failed to parse YAML front matter") surfaces as error when a user's skill YAML is malformed (user-editable skill files) -> translate as error message, YAML preserved. undo.rs:216 — .expect(...) -> panic_message. manager.rs:239 — format! error message returned for unsupported GCP token type; translated as error message preserving {other} placeholder and backtick code quoting. suggest/mod.rs:104 — format! building completion suggestion description shown in completer UI -> translate, preserved {replacement_text} placeholder and escaped quotes. examples/typed_actions/root_view.rs:123 — string in examples/ demo view -> test_fixture. cursor_theme.rs:6 — THEME_FILE_CURSOR_SECTION = "Icon Theme", a freedesktop index.theme INI section name (external format key) -> protocol_key. single_axis_config.rs:136/144 — .expect(...) x2 -> panic_message. watcher/lib.rs:150 — thread::Builder::name("Bulk Filesystem Watcher"), diagnostic thread name visible only in debuggers/profilers, not UI -> telemetry_payload.
